_description: Typed acceptance-check template for a Teams notification goal.
_usage: Copy check into your intent.json goal with kind=notify. Replace SCRIPT_PATH with your verify script.
_pattern: Run a verification script that returns exit 0 only when the Teams message was received/confirmed.
_notes: The verify script should confirm the message arrived (e.g. query the Teams incoming webhook log or a sentinel file written by the notification handler).
The check MUST fail before the notification goal is implemented — use a placeholder script that exits 1 to enforce baseline RED.
For Phoenix Teams relay (ATV-Teams), the script can POST a test message and verify a sentinel acknowledgement.
